title: For the choirmaster. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.

verses.1: Clap your hands, all you peoples; shout unto God with a voice of triumph.
verses.2: How awesome is the LORD Most High, the great King over all the earth!
verses.3: He subdues nations beneath us, and peoples under our feet.
verses.4: He chooses our inheritance for us, the pride of Jacob, whom He loves. Selah
verses.5: God has ascended amid shouts of joy, the LORD with the sound of the horn.
verses.6: Sing praises to God, sing praises; sing praises to our King, sing praises!
verses.7: For God is King of all the earth; sing to Him a psalm of praise.
verses.8: God reigns over the nations; God is seated on His holy throne.
verses.9: The nobles of the nations have assembled as the people of the God of Abraham; for the shields of the earth belong to God; He is highly exalted.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
